title: Flux Qubits: Persistent Current Quantum States
description: Explore flux qubits where quantum information is encoded in the direction of circulating supercurrent. Learn about the RF-SQUID, three-junction flux qubit, and the fluxonium as a modern evolution.
learningObjectives: Explain how flux qubits encode information in persistent current states
Describe the double-well potential and tunneling in flux qubits
Compare the RF-SQUID and three-junction flux qubit designs
Understand the fluxonium qubit as a modern flux qubit variant
Analyze the trade-offs between flux noise sensitivity and anharmonicity
